# Web cache: openclaw 六阶段流水线 深度剖析 汤师爷 2026 年 2 月 2 日 万字图文 site:medium.com

> 时间: 2026-03-08 06:57


## 1. 
- 来源: duckduckgo

Update 2 nd Feb: Clawdbot was renamed to Moltbot and then to Openclaw . the article was updated based on latest comments. Openclaw (Previously Clawdbot → Moldbot ) is an open-source personal AI assistant you run yourself, on your computer or server. We all thought OpenClaw won the personal assistant race despite the initial flaws. It turns out OpenClaw is facing steep competition from alternatives we never could have thought possible at the OpenClaw launch magical moment. Press enter or click to
